scripts.build:native-helper: swiftc -O -target arm64-apple-macosx11.0 native/ag-minimize.swift -o /tmp/ag-minimize-arm64 && swiftc -O -target x86_64-apple-macosx11.0 native/ag-minimize.swift -o /tmp/ag-minimize-x86_64 && lipo -create /tmp/ag-minimize-arm64 /tmp/ag-minimize-x86_64 -output native-bin/ag-minimize-darwin-universal && chmod +x native-bin/ag-minimize-darwin-universal
